differential_diagnoses: Post-acute sequelae of SARS-CoV-2 (PASC) with autonomic dysfunction
next_steps: Cardiac magnetic resonance imaging (CMRI) with late gadolinium enhancement
Echocardiogram to assess wall motion abnormalities and valvular function
Serologic testing for Lyme disease (Borrelia burgdorferi IgG/IgM and Western blot)
Serologic testing for Q fever (Phase I and II antibodies)
Continuous cardiac telemetry and Holter monitoring for arrhythmia characterization
Comprehensive autoimmune workup including ANA, RF, and complement levels
Avoid initiation of AV-nodal blocking agents until structural/infectious etiologies are ruled out
